name: JonDash official addons
description: Official add-on modules for JonDash. In JonDash, add this repo as a module source (Admin -> Settings -> Modules) to browse and install. Modules update independently of the JonDash base app. Channels: the main branch = stable; this manifest (beta branch) = beta. See VERSIONING.md.

modules.name: Health monitoring
modules.description: Watches your services with HTTP, TCP, ping, DNS and certificate checks, records uptime and response times, and alerts by email or webhook when something goes down.
modules.notes: Checks are now added and changed in Admin -> Modules -> Health monitoring, and the module page is display-only. The form adapts to what you are checking: website, ping, port, DNS or SSL certificate.

modules.name: Module template (for developers)
modules.description: FOR DEVELOPERS — a working example to copy when building your own module. Installs to modules/template; open MODULE.md in that folder for a full guide, and AI-PROMPT.md to have an AI build one for you. Safe to install, and safe to uninstall when you're done.
modules.notes: The AI prompt now covers the whole job: standing up a throwaway JonDash, running the installer verifier, running tests, and clicking through the result — so an agent can hand back tested work, not just code.
